header: Content Grid for polished editorial systems

items.title: Content Grid for polished editorial systems
items.content: Turns editorial material into a polished reading surface with compact hierarchy, clear affordances, and shadcn token rhythm. This content grid example includes realistic content for browser review.

items.title: Content Grid for polished editorial systems
items.content: Gives content teams practical copy, useful metadata, and responsive density that works across long-form pages and compact previews. This content grid example includes realistic content for browser review.

items.title: Content Grid for polished editorial systems
